patthana20.1:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu ca nahetu ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana20.1:3.1.pli: Nanahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu ca nahetu ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana20.1:4.1.pli: Nahetuñca nanahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuñca nanahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuñca nanahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca hetu ca nahetu ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.1:5.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe nava …pe… avigate nava.

patthana20.1:7.1.pli: Nasahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca ahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sahetuko ca ahetuko ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

Nasahetukañca naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca sahetuko ca ahetuko ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.1:10.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cha, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… avigate nava.

patthana20.1:12.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cha, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… avigate nava.

Nasanidassanaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassano ca anidassano ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, ārammaṇe ekaṁ …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana20.2:7.1.pli: Nasanidassano dhammo anidassanassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Naanidassano dhammo anidassanassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.8:13.1.pli: Nasavitakkañca naavitakkañca dhammaṁ paṭicca savitakko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasavitakkañca naavitakkañca dhammaṁ paṭicca avitakko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasavitakkañca naavitakkañca dhammaṁ paṭicca savitakko ca avitakko ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.8:14.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe nava …pe… purejāte āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana20.8:16.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe nava …pe… purejāte āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana20.8:18.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe nava …pe… purejāte āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana20.8:19.1.pli: Napītisahagataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca pītisahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.8:20.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe nava …pe… purejāte āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana20.8:21.1.pli: Nasukhasahagataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sukhasahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.8:22.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe nava …pe… purejāte āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

Naupekkhāsahagataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca upekkhāsahagato ca naupekkhāsahagato ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana20.8:24.1.pli: Nanaupekkhāsahagataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naupekkhāsahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana20.8:25.1.pli: Naupekkhāsahagatañca nanaupekkhāsahagatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca upekkhāsahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naupekkhāsahagatañca nanaupekkhāsahagatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naupekkhāsahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naupekkhāsahagatañca nanaupekkhāsahagatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca upekkhāsahagato ca naupekkhāsahagato ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.8:26.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe nava …pe… purejāte āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana20.8:27.1.pli: Nakāmāvacaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kāmāvacaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nakāmāvacaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakāmāvacaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nakāmāvacaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kāmāvacaro ca nakāmāvacaro ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana20.8:28.1.pli: Nanakāmāvacaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakāmāvacaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana20.8:29.1.pli: Nakāmāvacarañca nanakāmāvacarañca dhammaṁ paṭicca kāmāvacaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.8:30.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cattāri, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… purejāte āsevane dve …pe… avigate nava.

patthana20.8:31.1.pli: Narūpāvacaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca rūpāvacaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.8:32.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cattāri, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… purejāte āsevane dve …pe… avigate nava.

patthana20.8:33.1.pli: Naarūpāvacaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naarūpāvacaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.8:34.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke dve …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana20.8:35.1.pli: Napariyāpannaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca pariyāpanno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana20.8:36.1.pli: Naapariyāpannaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca pariyāpanno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana20.8:37.1.pli: Napariyāpannañca naapariyāpannañca dhammaṁ paṭicca pariyāpanno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.8:38.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana20.8:39.1.pli: Naniyyānikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca aniyyāniko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana20.8:40.1.pli: Naaniyyānikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca aniyyāniko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana20.8:41.1.pli: Naniyyānikañca naaniyyānikañca dhammaṁ paṭicca aniyyāniko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.8:42.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe ekaṁ …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana20.8:43.1.pli: Naniyataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca aniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana20.8:44.1.pli: Naaniyataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca aniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana20.8:45.1.pli: Naniyatañca naaniyatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca aniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.8:46.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana20.8:47.1.pli: Nasauttaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sauttaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasauttaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anuttaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasauttaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sauttaro ca anuttaro ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana20.8:48.1.pli: Naanuttaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sauttaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana20.8:49.1.pli: Nasauttarañca naanuttarañca dhammaṁ paṭicca sauttaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.8:50.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana20.9:1.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca araṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana20.9:2.1.pli: Naaraṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca araṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana20.9:3.1.pli: Nasaraṇañca naaraṇañca dhammaṁ paṭicca araṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.9:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana20.9:5.1.pli: Nasaraṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca araṇo dhammo uppajjati nahetupaccayā. Naaraṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca saraṇo dhammo uppajjati nahetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.9:6.1.pli: Nahetuyā dve, naārammaṇe tīṇi, naadhipatiyā pañca …pe… napurejāte cattāri …pe… nakamme dve …pe… naāhāre naindriye najhāne namagge ekaṁ …pe… navippayutte dve …pe… novigate tīṇi.

patthana20.9:8.1.pli: Nasaraṇo dhammo araṇassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana20.9:9.1.pli: Naaraṇo dhammo araṇassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. Naaraṇo dhammo saraṇassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. Naaraṇo dhammo saraṇassa ca araṇassa ca dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana20.9:10.1.pli: Nasaraṇo dhammo saraṇassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Nasaraṇo dhammo araṇassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … dve.

patthana20.9:11.1.pli: Naaraṇo dhammo araṇassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Naaraṇo dhammo saraṇassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … dve. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.9:12.1.pli: Hetuyā cattāri, ārammaṇe cattāri, ārammaṇe cattāri, adhipatiyā pañca, anantare cattāri …pe… sahajāte pañca, aññamaññe dve, nissaye satta, upanissaye cattāri, purejāte pacchājāte āsevane dve, kamme cattāri, vipāke ekaṁ, āhāre indriye jhāne magge cattāri, sampayutte dve, vippayutte tīṇi …pe… avigate satta.

patthana20.9:13.1.pli: Nasaraṇo dhammo saraṇassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo, upanissayapaccayena paccayo, purejātapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana20.9:14.1.pli: Nahetuyā satta, naārammaṇe satta …pe… nasahajāte naaññamaññe nanissaye pañca …pe… napurejāte cha …pe… nasampayutte pañca, navippayutte cattāri …pe… noavigate cattāri.

patthana20.9:15.1.pli: (Yathā kusalattike pañhāvārassa anulomampi paccanīyampi anulomapaccanīyampi paccanīyānulomampi gaṇitaṁ, evaṁ gaṇetabbaṁ.)

patthana21.1:2.1.pli: Nahetuṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nahetu kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu kusalo ca nahetu kusalo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.1:3.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā hetu akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.1:4.1.pli: Nahetuṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanahetuṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ naabyākatañca nanahetuṁ naabyākatañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.1:5.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana21.11:1.1.pli: Āsavavippayuttaṁ naanāsavaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā āsavavippayutto anāsavo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Āsavavippayuttaṁ naanāsavaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā āsavavippayutto sāsavo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā dve …pe… avigate dve.

patthana21.11:2.1.pli: Āsavavippayuttaṁ naanāsavaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā āsavavippayutto sāsavo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.11:3.1.pli: Āsavavippayuttaṁ nasāsavaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca āsavavippayutto sāsavo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. patthana21.12:5.1.pli: Naoghaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā ogho akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.12:7.1.pli: Nayogaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā yogo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.12:9.1.pli: Nanīvaraṇaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nīvaraṇo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.12:11.1.pli: Naparāmāsaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā parāmāso akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:1.1.pli: Nasārammaṇaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā sārammaṇo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.13:2.1.pli: Nasārammaṇaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā sārammaṇo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.13:3.1.pli: Naanārammaṇaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anārammaṇo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekaṁ, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… avigate ekaṁ.

patthana21.13:4.1.pli: Nocittaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā citto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:5.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi. (Naakusale tīṇi. Naabyākate tīṇi. Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:6.1.pli: Nacetasikaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā cetasiko kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:8.1.pli: Nacittasampayuttaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā cittasampayutto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:10.1.pli: Nacittasaṁsaṭṭhaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā cittasaṁsaṭṭho kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:12.1.pli: Nacittasamuṭṭhānaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā cittasamuṭṭhāno kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:14.1.pli: Nacittasahabhuṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā cittasahabhū kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:16.1.pli: Nacittānuparivattiṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā cittānuparivattī kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:18.1.pli: Nacittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā cittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhāno kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:20.1.pli: Nacittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānasahabhuṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā cittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānasahabhū kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:22.1.pli: Nacittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānānuparivattiṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā cittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānānuparivattī kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:24.1.pli: Naajjhattikaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā ajjhattiko kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:26.1.pli: Nanoupādā nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā noupādā kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.13:28.1.pli: Naanupādinnaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā anupādinno kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.14:1.1.pli: Naupādānaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā upādāno akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana21.15:1.1.pli: Nakilesaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā kileso akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)
